data.title: Tom Lee: The S&P 500 is very likely to break through 7700 points this year.
data.description: Tom Lee stated that the S&P 500 is very likely to break through 7700 points this year, citing the resilience of the economy during the war with Iran. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda: If the current supply shock triggers a second wave of cascading effects, interest rate hikes will be necessary.
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda: If the current supply shock triggers a second wave of cascading effects, an interest rate hike will be necessary. (Jinshi)

data.title: Barclays Reports Mixed First Quarter Trading Results
data.description: Barclays announced on April 28 that its trading business experienced mixed results in the first quarter, with equities outperforming expectations while fixed income fell short. According to Jin10, the bank stated on Tuesday that fixed income trading revenue was £1.7 billion, roughly flat year-on-year, while equities trading revenue rose 16% to £1.1 billion. The investment banking division also exceeded expectations, with first-quarter revenue reaching £754 million. Barclays is the first major UK bank to report first-quarter results, providing investors with a reference on how the industry is coping with increased economic uncertainty due to the Iran conflict. Led by Adeel Khan, the global markets business did not benefit from the trading boom experienced by some U.S. counterparts. Earlier this month, Wall Street banks noted that recent market volatility favored trading businesses, with some sectors achieving record earnings. As part of a plan to return £10 billion to shareholders over three years, Barclays announced a new £500 million share buyback. The bank also disclosed a £200 million impairment in its investment banking division related to a "single client," according to sources familiar with the matter.

data.title: Nvidia's Global Influence Rivals National Economies
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Nvidia's influence in the global market has grown to such an extent that it is now comparable to a national asset. In the MSCI ACWI global index, Nvidia holds a weight of approximately 4.96%, slightly surpassing the entire Japanese stock market's weight of 4.94%. This means that Nvidia's presence in the global stock index outweighs that of sovereign nations like Japan, the United Kingdom, and Canada. For investors in global index funds tracking the ACWI, nearly $5 out of every $100 invested is effectively a stake in Nvidia.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda on Timing of Next Rate Hike
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda stated that he is unable to determine how many months it will take to assess the timing of the next interest rate hike. According to Jin10, Ueda emphasized the need for careful evaluation before making any decisions regarding monetary policy adjustments.

data.title: Solana Faces Key Support at $78 Amid Weak ETF Inflows
data.description: Solana (SOL) enters May with $78 as a critical support level following a decline in April spot Solana ETF inflows, which fell to $39.93 million, marking the weakest month since the ETF's launch, according to SoSoValue data. A head and shoulders pattern suggests a potential drop to the $56 zone if the neckline is breached. However, the decreasing sell volume and historically positive performance in May provide a basis for a potential rebound.

data.title: Bitget launches the third CFD King of Kings Tournament, with a total prize pool of 80,000 USDT.
data.description: Bitget launches its third CFD King of Kings competition, with a total prize pool of 80,000 USDT. This event includes three main sections: a blind box zone, a points-based zone, and a ranking zone. During the event, both new and existing users can earn blind box rewards by completing designated CFD trading tasks daily, and also have a chance to win USDT cash vouchers. The prize pool has a 100% winning rate and operates on a first-come, first-served basis. In addition, users who complete trading in designated currencies can participate in the points-based and ranking zones, with a maximum prize of 3,000 USDT per person. After the event ends, the top 100 users by trading volume will also receive a random amount of CFD credit. Participation runs from April 27th to May 22nd. For more details, please visit the official Bitget platform.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor Ueda: Outlook Assumes No Major Supply Chain Disruptions
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda stated that the central bank's outlook is based on the assumption that there will be no significant disruptions in supply chains. According to Jin10, Ueda emphasized the importance of stable supply chains for the economic forecasts and policies set by the Bank of Japan. The governor's comments highlight the ongoing concerns about global supply chain stability and its impact on economic planning.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank Governor Projects Inflation to Reach 2% Target by 2027
data.description: Japan's Central Bank Governor Kazuo Ueda has projected that inflation will reach the Bank of Japan's 2% target between the second half of the 2026 fiscal year and the 2027 fiscal year. According to Jin10, this forecast aligns with the central bank's ongoing efforts to stabilize the country's economy and achieve sustainable growth. Ueda's statement reflects the Bank of Japan's commitment to its monetary policy goals amid global economic uncertainties.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor: Proposal to Include CPI Target Achievement in Statement
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda has revealed that board member Takata has proposed incorporating a statement indicating that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) has reached its target level. According to Jin10, this suggestion aims to reflect the current economic conditions and the progress made towards achieving inflation targets. The proposal highlights the importance of transparency in communicating monetary policy objectives and achievements to the public.

data.title: Tempo Introduces Subscription Payment and Virtual Address Features
data.description: Tempo, a payment blockchain, has announced the launch of its subscription payment, automatic deduction, and virtual address features. According to Foresight News, businesses can now authorize regular automatic deductions and generate unique virtual addresses for each customer or invoice. Funds are automatically collected in the main wallet without additional initialization or token scanning, significantly reducing operational costs. The company stated that its stablecoin advisory team is available to assist businesses in evaluating use cases and implementing production solutions.

data.title: Riot Revises Terms of $200 Million Bitcoin Collateralized Credit Line with Coinbase
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Riot Platforms has revised its $200 million Bitcoin-collateralized lending agreement with Coinbase, changing the original floating rate linked to the US federal funds rate to a fixed annual rate and introducing a two-day trigger mechanism to reduce the impact of short-term Bitcoin price volatility on additional collateral and forced deleveraging. The new agreement is set to expire on April 21, 2026, and can be extended for another year. Documents show that Riot previously sold 3,778 Bitcoins in the first quarter of 2026, generating approximately $289.5 million in revenue; as of March 31, its restricted Bitcoin collateral had increased to 5,802 Bitcoins. (TheEnergyMag)

data.title: Monad X Account Frozen on X Platform
data.description: The Monad X account on the X platform has been frozen, according to Foresight News. The specific reason for the account's suspension remains unclear at this time.

data.title: China's UN Representative Calls for Ceasefire in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Fu Cong, China's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, addressed the UN Security Council maritime security debate on the 27th, highlighting the military actions by the United States and Israel against Iran as the primary cause of tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, Fu Cong emphasized the need for a comprehensive and lasting ceasefire to resolve the ongoing conflict.

data.title: China speaks out at the United Nations: The root cause of the obstruction in the Strait of Hormuz lies with the US and Israel.
data.description: Fu Cong, China's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, stated at a high-level open debate on maritime security at the Security Council on the 27th that the root cause of the obstruction in the Strait of Hormuz lies in the illegal military actions launched by the United States and Israel against Iran, and the solution to the obstruction of navigation in the strait is to achieve a comprehensive and lasting ceasefire as soon as possible. (Xinhua International)

data.title: Data: ETH total 24-hour contract trading volume increased by 38.22%.
data.description: According to CoinGlass data, the total trading volume of ETH futures contracts increased by 38.22% in the past 24 hours, currently reaching $46.297 billion. Binance's trading volume is $12.6 billion, OKX's is $8.88 billion, and Gate's is $5.878 billion. Meanwhile, the total open interest of ETH futures contracts is approximately $31.729 billion. Binance's open interest is $6.66 billion, and Gate's is $4.18 billion.

data.title: Three Reasons to Be Bullish on Ethena
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Ethena is gaining attention for several reasons. Firstly, it serves as the yield layer of the U.S. dollar economy. Secondly, it is the only protocol that connects the stablecoin economy with the perpetual economy through a single mechanism. Lastly, there is a pricing discrepancy for ENA, given a total fee rate of 3.6 times and zero value accumulation. This presents an asymmetry in any reasonable growth scenario, even those significantly below the management's set targets.

data.title: Brent Johnson Discusses Impact of Stablecoins on Dollar Milkshake Theory
data.description:
Brent Johnson, CEO of Santiago Capital and proponent of the 'Dollar Milkshake Theory,' spoke at the 'Bitcoin 2026' conference, highlighting the significant role of dollar stablecoins in supporting his theory. According to Foresight News, Johnson noted that global citizens are increasingly adopting dollar stablecoins due to their superior utility compared to local currencies. This trend effectively undermines national monetary sovereignty and reverses the 'de-dollarization' process into 're-dollarization,' causing concern among central banks worldwide.

Johnson explained that the rise of stablecoins has somewhat suppressed Bitcoin prices, as funds that might have been invested in Bitcoin are instead directed towards Tether. However, he argued that for the U.S. to maintain the stablecoin system, it cannot easily suppress other digital assets, which inadvertently provides some protection for Bitcoin.

He expressed skepticism about the permanence of fiat currencies, predicting that all fiat currencies will eventually revert to their intrinsic value of 'zero,' with the dollar being the last to fall. Johnson also mentioned that a Bitcoin price surge beyond $1 million would not surprise him, attributing such a scenario to global mass money printing. However, he doubted that most companies would follow Strategy's lead in adding Bitcoin to their balance sheets due to its high volatility, which boards of directors might find difficult to manage.

Foresight News explained that the 'Dollar Milkshake Theory' describes the dollar's dominant position in the global monetary system. During times of economic uncertainty or sovereign debt crises, investors flock to the dollar, causing it to act like a 'straw' that draws liquidity from the global 'milkshake.' This strengthens the dollar further while exerting pressure on other countries, particularly those with significant dollar-denominated debt.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Time Magazine Reveals 2026's Top 10 Influential AI Companies
data.description: Time Magazine has announced its list of the 'Top 10 Most Influential AI Companies of 2026.' Unlike rankings that focus solely on model capabilities, this list emphasizes the comprehensive impact on industry, technological pathways, and societal influence. According to Jin10, the companies featured include ByteDance, Amazon, Zhipu, OpenAI, Alphabet, Meta, Anthropic, Alibaba, Mistral, and Hugging Face. Notably, three Chinese companies made the list: ByteDance, Zhipu, and Alibaba.

data.title: Binance to Suspend Ronin Network Transactions for Migration
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, starting at approximately 2026-05-12 14:00 (UTC), the platform will temporarily suspend deposits and withdrawals of tokens on the Ronin network to facilitate its network migration. The migration is scheduled to occur at the block height of 55,577,490, which is expected to be around 2026-05-12 15:00 (UTC). It is important to note that the trading of tokens on the Ronin network will remain unaffected during this period.

Binance has assured users that it will manage all technical requirements related to the migration process. Once the migration is completed and the network is deemed stable, deposits and withdrawals for tokens on the Ronin network will be reopened. Binance has indicated that no further announcements will be made regarding this matter. Users are encouraged to refer to the original English version of the announcement for the most accurate information, as there may be discrepancies between translated versions.
